title: SpecMeta intake answers
description: Non-interactive answers to the seven Phase-1 intake questions of the AI decision workflow.

greenfield.description: Is this a brand-new codebase, or are we modifying an existing one?

non_engineer_reviewers.description: Will non-engineers (PM, designer, compliance auditor) review the spec?

portability_priority.description: How important is being able to swap models, agents, or IDEs later?

drift_priority.description: How important is keeping spec and code in sync after release?

formal_verification.description: Does any subsystem need formal verification (TLA+ / Alloy / model checking)?

team_size.description: Number of engineers who will touch this repo regularly.

editor.description: Primary editor or coding agent. 'mixed' triggers a portability bias even if portability_priority is 'low'.

notes.description: Optional free-form context the agent should consider (e.g. 'we use Bazel', 'compliance: SOC2').
